repaymentNotes: Interest starts accruing from the date of first disbursement at 4% per annum simple interest
Grace period of 1 year after completion of studies before repayment begins
Minimum monthly repayment is KES 1,500 or 10% of gross salary, whichever is higher
Late payment attracts a 5% penalty on outstanding amount
Maximum repayment period is 15 years from the start of repayment
Employers are required to deduct HELB repayments from salary (statutory deduction)
Lump sum payments can be made to reduce the principal and shorten the repayment period
